testcase.name: User can see their coordinates after clicking Where Am I
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Geolocation page..........................................passed When I click the "Where am I?" button.......................................passed Then I should see my latitude on the screen.................................passed And I should see my longitude on the screen.................................passed

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed
